## Issue Title

<!-- Short description of the problem or feature request -->

## Context

<!-- Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Acceptance Criteria

> **Every issue must have clear, testable acceptance criteria before work begins.**

- [ ] **AC-1:** [criterion — be specific and objective]
- [ ] **AC-2:** [criterion]
- [ ] **AC-3:** [criterion]

**Tips for good ACs:**
- Each AC should be independently verifiable
- Include expected behavior, not implementation details
- Use "the system should X" not "we could X"
- Each AC should have a clear pass/fail

## Technical Notes / Design

<!-- Optional: any design decisions, constraints, or context -->

## Related Issues

<!-- Links to related issues -->

## Labels

- [ ] `enhancement` / `bug` / `documentation` / `question`
- [ ] `priority:high` / `priority:medium` / `priority:low`
- [ ] `good first issue` / `help wanted`
